properties.name: An Creagán
properties.description: A beautiful center nestled in the Sperrin Mountains. Offers great forest trails, a bog walk, a duck pond, and an outdoor playground, all rooted in local culture and nature.

properties.name: Glenpark Estate
properties.description: A fantastic family destination featuring a woodland animal trail, a large open-air play area, and an indoor soft play. Perfect for seeing deer and rare breed animals up close.
